headline: 2 Dow Jones Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 Facing Headwinds

headline: Greywolf Therapeutics appoints Edwin Moses as Chair
summary: OXFORD, United Kingdom, April 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Greywolf Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biotech company advancing novel antigen modulation treatments for cancer and autoimmune diseases, has appointed Edwin Moses as Chair of the Board of Directors, with immediate effect. Dr Moses is a serial entrepreneur and value creator with more than 30 years of board-level experience across more than 20 life sciences companies.
